{% extends "layouts/vendor_base.html" %}{% block title %}Earnings{% endblock %}{% block vendor_content %}
{% include "components/kpi_card.html" with label="Balance" value=balance|default:"GH₵ 0" icon="lucide:wallet" %}{% include "components/kpi_card.html" with label="Pending" value=pending|default:"GH₵ 0" icon="lucide:clock" icon_bg="golden-yellow" %}{% include "components/kpi_card.html" with label="Paid" value=paid|default:"GH₵ 0" icon="lucide:check-circle" %}
{% endblock %}
